nodejs.name: nodejs
nodejs.description: Node.js - JavaScript 运行时，构建可扩展的网络应用
nodejs.author: OpenJS Foundation

installation_sources.command:
# Install NVM with mirror support
export NVM_NODEJS_ORG_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/node
curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.7/install.sh | bash
source ~/.bashrc
nvm install 22
nvm use 22
nvm alias default 22

# Download and install from mirror
# Note: Manual download required for Windows

curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | sudo -E bash -
sudo apt install -y nodejs

# Download from mirror
wget {{mirror_url}}
tar -xJf node-v{{version}}-linux-x64.tar.xz
sudo mv node-v{{version}}-linux-x64 /usr/local/lib/nodejs
sudo ln -sf /usr/local/lib/nodejs/bin/node /usr/bin/node
sudo ln -sf /usr/local/lib/nodejs/bin/npm /usr/bin/npm
sudo ln -sf /usr/local/lib/nodejs/bin/npx /usr/bin/npx

post_install.command:
npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
npm config set disturl https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/node
npm config set electron_mirror https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/
npm config set puppeteer_download_host https://npmmirror.com/mirrors

npm install -g npm@latest
npm install -g yarn pnpm typescript
npm install -g http-server serve nodemon

notes: Node.js 20+ requires Linux kernel 4.18+ or macOS 11+ or Windows 10 1809+
NVM allows multiple Node.js versions to be installed in parallel
CN region automatically uses npmmirror.com for better speed
Puppeteer, Electron, and other binary packages have mirror configuration

python.name: python
python.description: Python - 简单、优雅、强大的编程语言
python.author: Python Software Foundation

installation_sources.command:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install software-properties-common -y
sudo add-apt-repository ppa:deadsnakes/ppa -y
sudo apt update
sudo apt install -y python3.12 python3.12-dev python3-pip
sudo update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python3 python3 /usr/bin/python3.12 1

sudo apt update
sudo apt install -y python3 python3-pip python3-dev

export HOMEBREW_BOTTLE_DOMAIN="https://mirrors.aliyun.com/homebrew/homebrew-bottles"
export HOMEBREW_BREW_GIT_REMOTE="https://mirrors.aliyun.com/homebrew/homebrew-brew.git"
export HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE="https://mirrors.aliyun.com/homebrew/homebrew-core.git"
brew install python3

post_install.command:
pip3 config set global.index-url https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple
pip3 config set global.trusted-host pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn
pip3 config set install.timeout 120

post_install.description: Upgrade pip and install common packages
post_install.command:
python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
pip3 install requests beautifulsoup4 lxml selenium
pip3 install numpy pandas matplotlib scipy

notes: Multiple versions can be installed in parallel
Use pyenv for version management if needed
CN region automatically uses mirror sources
Pip is configured with mirror by default in CN

rbenv install 3.2.0
rbenv global 3.2.0

config_files.template:
[user]
  name = {{ username }}
  email = {{ email }}
[core]
  editor = vim
  autocrlf = input
  excludesfile = ~/.gitignore_global
[init]
  defaultBranch = main
[pull]
  rebase = true
[push]
  autoSetupRemote = true
[color]
  ui = true

optimization_tips: Enable Git LFS for large files
Use shallow clones for big repos

docker.name: docker
docker.author: Docker Inc.

installation_sources.description: Official Docker Install Script with Mirror (Recommended)
installation_sources.command:
# 使用阿里云镜像加速脚本
curl -fsSL https://get.daocloud.io/docker | sh
# 启动Docker服务
sudo systemctl start docker
sudo systemctl enable docker
# 配置镜像加速
sudo mkdir -p /etc/docker
sudo tee /etc/docker/daemon.json <<-'EOF'
{
  "registry-mirrors": [
    "https://docker.mirrors.ustc.edu.cn",
    "https://hub-mirror.c.163.com",
    "https://mirror.ccs.tencentyun.com"
  ],
  "data-root": "/var/lib/docker"
}
EOF
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl restart docker

sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install ca-certificates curl gnupg lsb-release -y
sudo mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings
curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg
echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $(lsb_release -cs) stable" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io -y

post_install.description: Configure Docker mirror and add user to docker group
post_install.command:
sudo usermod -aG docker $USER
echo "You need to log out and log back in to use Docker without sudo"

sudo apt install docker-compose -y 2>/dev/null || true
docker compose version || true

notes: Docker Desktop requires virtualization enabled in BIOS/UEFI
CN region automatically uses registry mirrors for faster pull operations
Docker Desktop for Windows requires WSL 2
Requires admin/root to install, but regular user can be added to docker group
